landing.heroTitle: Chef Menu Intelligence for Every Family Table
landing.heroSubtitle: Plan safe weekly menus, calculate grams per diner, track ingredients, protect allergies, and use AI suggestions that still obey chef-approved rules.
landing.problemTitle: Family menu planning breaks when safety, variety, and portions all matter.
problemItems: Families repeat the same food too often.
Children and adults have different nutrition needs.
Restrictions multiply across families and diners.
landing.solutionTitle: A chef operations platform with family nutrition intelligence.
solutionItems: Nutrition and portion calculation in grams.
Allergy validation and missing ingredient alerts.
Shopping list generation and freezer inventory.
AI meal planning through a secure backend.
landing.chefsBody: Manage several families, diners, preferences, allergies, recipes, and weekly menus from one clean workspace.
landing.familiesBody: Approve menus, understand what will be served, check safety, and track nutrition without turning dinner into administration.
landing.aiBody: Generate menus, suggest recipes, replace unavailable ingredients, create shopping lists, and validate every idea against allergies, nutrition, pantry availability, and rotation rules.
landing.trustBody: Allergy validation, ingredient traceability, human approval, and AI outputs that cannot override blocked safety rules.
landing.finalTitle: Build safer menus with less guesswork.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage family menus.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We will send reset instructions if the email exists.
auth.authError: Authentication failed. Check your settings or use the demo workspace.

dashboard.title: Kitchen Operations Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Safety, portions, nutrition, inventory, and AI readiness in one chef-ready view.
dashboard.noMissingIngredients: No missing ingredients for the current plan.
dashboard.aiReadyBody: Ask AI Chef for safe menu ideas, substitutions, freezer usage, or missing slot completion. Suggestions still pass safety validation before use.

families.title: Families
families.subtitle: Manage households, assigned chefs, diner safety, and weekly menu status.

diners.title: Diners
diners.subtitle: Profiles, targets, preferences, restrictions, and recipe safety by person.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.subtitle: Nutrition per 100 g, allergen metadata, costs, package sizes, and recipe usage.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Build recipes with ingredients, grams, nutrition, safety, usage, and rotation intelligence.
recipes.name: Name
recipes.requiresIngredients: A recipe requires at least one ingredient.
recipes.requiresPositiveQuantity: Ingredient quantity must be greater than zero.

planner.title: Menu Planner
planner.subtitle: Plan weekly or monthly menus by family, diner, meal slot, safety, nutrition, and rotation.
planner.rotationMessage: This dish was served {{days}} days ago. It should wait {{wait}} more days before repeating.

portion.title: Portion Calculator
portion.subtitle: Convert menus into diner portions, chef production quantities, and batch summaries.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Generate, consolidate, subtract pantry inventory, and print grouped purchase lists.
shopping.noPantryComparison: Generate a shopping list to compare pantry coverage.
shopping.regenerateNeeded: The menu changed after this shopping list was generated. Regenerate the list before purchasing.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.subtitle: Track available ingredients, expiration dates, storage locations, and low-stock thresholds.
pantry.noExpiring: No pantry items are expiring soon.
pantry.usageBody: Pantry quantities are compared against upcoming menu production requirements.

freezer.title: Freezer
freezer.subtitle: Manage prepared meals, expiration dates, portions, grams per portion, and reheating instructions.
freezer.noExpiring: No freezer meals are expiring soon.
freezer.noLowPortions: No freezer meals are below the portion buffer.
freezer.useInMenuBody: {{portions}} portions available. Adding to menu will subtract one portion.

allergies.title: Allergy Shield
allergies.subtitle: Validate diners, ingredients, recipes, traces, cross-contact, and emergency notes.
allergies.noAllergies: No allergies have been registered for this selection.
allergies.crossContactBody: When traces are avoided or cross-contact risk is enabled, ambiguous ingredient data should be reviewed before the recipe is served.
sorenRules: Wheat, rye, barley, gluten, trigo, centeno and cebada are blocked.
Tree nuts are blocked except almonds and almendras.
Sesame, sesamo and tahini are blocked.
Sunflower seeds, butter and flour are blocked; sunflower oil and lecithin are allowed.
Red, green, brown and black lentils are allowed; generic lentils require review.

recommendations.blocked: Do not serve without a documented override.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.subtitle: Daily, weekly, diner-specific, and family-level nutrition against targets.
nutrition.warningBody: This diner is outside the target range for calories or protein today.

dayPlanner.subtitle: Focus one service day at a time: plan meals, validate safety, check nutrition, and print the kitchen plan.
dayPlanner.noMealsPlanned: No meals are planned for this day yet.
dayPlanner.noSafetyIssues: No blocked or review-needed meals for this day.
dayPlanner.noAiSuggestions: Run AI to generate safe day suggestions.
dayPlanner.confirmReviewSuggestion: This suggestion needs review. Apply it with a documented review note?
dayPlanner.confirmedReviewSuggestion: Reviewed from Day Planner AI suggestion.

ai.title: AI Chef
ai.subtitle: Use Gemini through a secure backend, then validate every structured suggestion before use.
ai.chatPlaceholder: Ask for a safe weekly menu, substitution, shopping list, or production plan.
ai.keySetupBody: Configure your Gemini API key in Settings to enable AI suggestions for this account.
ai.keyInvalidBody: The saved Gemini key is invalid or could not be tested. Test it again or replace it in Settings.
ai.keyRateLimitedBody: Your saved key appears usable, but Gemini quota or rate limits are active. Wait, test again, or switch to a lighter model in Settings.
ai.keyMissingCode: Gemini API key is not configured.
ai.reviewNeededStructuredData: This AI suggestion needs structured recipe or menu data before it can be applied safely.

tabDescriptions.menu: Plan or repair weekly menus using candidate recipes and server-side safety validation.
tabDescriptions.recipe: Draft safer recipe variations, substitutions, and chef-friendly instruction improvements.
tabDescriptions.inventory: Use pantry and freezer data to reduce waste, prioritize purchases, and explain missing items.
tabDescriptions.safety: Focus on allergy, nutrition, and production risks before a plan is served.
tabDescriptions.custom: Ask a custom question with the current family context. Results still require validation before use.

recommendedActions.custom: Start with a specific chef question

aiCopilot.title: AI Copilot
aiCopilot.subtitle: Ask for contextual help without leaving the chef workflow. Suggestions stay draft-only until validated and confirmed.
aiCopilot.noActions: No contextual AI actions for this view yet.
aiCopilot.emptyResult: Choose an action to generate a validated draft.
aiCopilot.reasonUnavailable: AI did not provide a reason.
aiCopilot.reviewBeforeApply: Review validation details before applying anything.
aiCopilot.applyDialogBody: Confirm exactly what will be created or updated. Unsafe suggestions are blocked.
aiCopilot.applyMissingData: This suggestion is missing structured data, so it cannot be applied automatically.
aiCopilot.applyBlockedUnsafe: This suggestion is blocked by safety validation and cannot be applied.
aiCopilot.applyNoAction: This suggestion is explanation-only and has no direct apply action.
aiCopilot.openRecipeBuilderRequired: New AI recipe drafts must open the Recipe Builder first; they are not created silently.
aiCopilot.recipePatchNotImplemented: Recipe updates from AI must be reviewed in the Recipe Builder before applying.
aiCopilot.missingStructuredPayload: Structured payload is missing or incomplete.
aiCopilot.appliedFromCopilot: Applied from AI Copilot after validation.
aiCopilot.readyBody: Gemini is configured for this user. AI suggestions will still be validated before use.
aiCopilot.setupBody: Configure your Gemini API key in Settings before running AI actions.
aiCopilot.rateLimitedBody: Gemini quota or rate limits are active. Wait for the cooldown, test again, or change model.
aiCopilot.providerFailureBody: The AI provider did not return a usable response. No data was changed.
aiCopilot.supabaseNotConfigured: AI backend is not configured yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, language, units, menu rotation, nutrition thresholds, safety, and AI configuration.
settings.connectionFailure: AI backend is not configured yet.
settings.keyValidSavePrompt: Key valid. Click Save to enable.
settings.rlsReady: RLS policies are enforced by Supabase.
settings.rlsLocalFallback: Local demo mode; connect Supabase to test RLS.
settings.edgeFunctionOnly: Gemini runs only through the Supabase Edge Function.
settings.securityFrontend: Frontend uses publishable Supabase keys only.
settings.securityAi: Gemini calls stay backend-only through ai-chef.
settings.securitySecrets: Secrets are not displayed in the application.
settings.securityRls: RLS remains the authority for database access.
settings.geminiByokDescription: Connect your own Gemini API key. The key is encrypted server-side and never shown again.
settings.replaceGeminiKey: Paste a new key to replace the saved key
settings.testKeySectionBody: Validate a pasted key or retry the saved key without enabling a new key yet.
settings.saveKeySectionBody: Store the key encrypted server-side and enable AI Chef for this account.
settings.keyValidSaveBody: The key tested successfully. Save it to enable AI Chef for this account.
settings.createGeminiKey: Create your Gemini API key in Google AI Studio
settings.geminiCostNotice: Gemini usage and costs belong to your own Google account.
settings.geminiEncryptedNotice: Your key is encrypted and used only from the server-side AI function.
settings.geminiKeySafetyNotice: Never share API keys. Restrict the key in Google Cloud or API settings where possible.
settings.geminiQuotaTitle: Gemini quota or rate limit reached
settings.geminiQuotaBody: HTTP 429 usually means the key is recognized but the selected model has no available quota right now. Wait and test again, try Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, or review quota and billing in Google AI Studio.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Printable chef and family reports for menus, nutrition, allergies, inventory, and production.

exports.pdfReady: PDF export is ready in the print dialog.

forecast.title: Inventory Forecast
forecast.freezerFirstBody: Use prepared meals that are expiring soon before planning new cooking.
forecast.noPriorityItems: No priority purchases for the selected family.
forecast.noExpiringItems: No pantry or freezer items are expiring soon.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Operational warnings generated from inventory, nutrition, allergies, freezer, and planning rules.
alerts.missingIngredientMessage: Pantry quantity is below the chef production requirement.
alerts.missingNutritionMessage: A recipe includes ingredients without complete nutrition values.
alerts.blockedRecipeMessage: A recipe is unsafe for at least one diner.
alerts.reviewRecipeMessage: A recipe contains ambiguous or trace-risk ingredients.
alerts.lowCaloriesMessage: Menu calories are below the diner target threshold.
alerts.lowProteinMessage: Menu protein is below the diner target threshold.
alerts.freezerExpiringMessage: A freezer item expires within the warning window.
alerts.freezerLowMessage: Prepared portions are below the target buffer.
alerts.profileIncompleteMessage: A diner profile is missing important nutrition data.
alerts.repeatedDishMessage: A menu item violates the configured rotation window.
alerts.unassignedSlotMessage: A menu plan still has missing meal slots.

resolutions.inventory: Review pantry stock and regenerate the shopping list.
resolutions.safety: Open the recipe or allergy module and resolve the safety status before serving.
resolutions.nutrition: Adjust menu portions or add a higher-nutrition meal.
resolutions.freezer: Use, restock, or discard freezer inventory according to expiration rules.
resolutions.planning: Assign a safe recipe to the open meal slot.
resolutions.review: Review the related record and document the resolution.

validation.positive: Value must be greater than zero.

errorBoundary.title: Something needs attention
errorBoundary.body: The app recovered from an unexpected issue. Return to the start screen and try the workflow again.

empty.families: Create your first family to begin planning.

empty.ingredients: Add ingredients with nutrition and allergen data.
empty.recipes: Create a recipe with ingredient grams before planning menus.

foodCategories.title: Food Categories
